items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for attribution model selection.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the attribution model selection (first touch/last touch/custom), but the provided evidence does not include any specific checks or data related to this requirement. While the linked use case mentions the need for an attribution model selection, there is no concrete evidence or API reads that confirm its implementation or functionality. Therefore, the validation is inconclusive due to a lack of necessary evidence.
